title: STAR-DELTA Open-Type Starter — Technical Data
why_selected: European/IEC three-phase star-delta reversal starter with main + delta + star contactors, overload, and terminal-to-terminal wiring. Page 4 is the campaign-verified rendered schematic page (corpus_manifest.md first-10, entry #3). Publicly published on library.e.abb.com; provenance verified 2026-07-10 (httpx application/pdf).
license_note: Publicly published OEM literature; ownership retained by ABB; retained only for read-only interpreter testing.
